name: Kaminak Gold Corporation
description: Kaminak Gold Corporation was a Canadian-based mineral exploration company primarily focused on the acquisition and development of gold projects in the Yukon Territory. The company's flagship asset was the Coffee Gold project, a high-grade, open-pit, heap-leach gold deposit. Kaminak was recognized for its successful exploration and development efforts in the White Gold District before being acquired by Goldcorp Inc. in 2016 for approximately C$520 million, marking a significant consolidation in the Canadian gold mining sector.
